releasedThisWeek.title: RAVEPOP
releasedThisWeek.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 充满未来感的电子流行，带你进入迷幻的舞池。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Futuristic electronic pop that takes you to a psychedelic dance floor.
releasedThisWeek.summary: r u s s e l b u c k 的《RAVEPOP》融合了电子与流行元素，营造出迷幻而充满活力的氛围，适合喜欢实验性音乐的听众。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: r u s s e l b u c k's 'RAVEPOP' blends electronic and pop elements, creating a psychedelic and energetic atmosphere for fans of experimental music.

releasedThisWeek.title: Euphoria
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Schiller 的经典氛围电子，深沉而富有情感。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Schiller's classic ambient electronic, deep and emotional.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Schiller 的《Euphoria》延续了其标志性的氛围电子风格，旋律优美，情感丰富，是放松和冥想的绝佳选择。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature ambient electronic style, with beautiful melodies and rich emotions, perfect for relaxation and meditation.

releasedThisWeek.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Lil Nas X 未完成的实验之作，充满惊喜。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished experimental work, full of surprises.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Lil Nas X 的《DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)》展示了他大胆的音乐实验，融合流行、说唱等元素，尽管未完成，但创意十足。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Lil Nas X's 'DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)' showcases his bold musical experimentation, blending pop and rap; despite being unfinished, it's full of creativity.

releasedThisWeek.title: Electric Fantasy
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 法国电子音乐人的梦幻之旅，旋律动人。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A dreamy journey from a French electronic musician, with touching melodies.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Pierre Schott 的《Electric Fantasy》是一张充满梦幻色彩的电子专辑，旋律优美，节奏舒缓，适合悠闲时光。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Pierre Schott's 'Electric Fantasy' is a dreamy electronic album with beautiful melodies and gentle rhythms, perfect for leisurely moments.

releasedThisWeek.title: Eingenordet
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国民谣金属，史诗般的叙事与力量。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: German folk metal with epic storytelling and power.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Versengold 的《Eingenordet》融合了民谣与金属，歌词充满历史叙事，音乐气势磅礴，是民谣金属爱好者的必听之作。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Versengold's 'Eingenordet' blends folk and metal, with lyrics full of historical narrative and powerful music, a must-listen for folk metal fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Don McLean 1975 年曼彻斯特现场，经典重现。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live, a classic revival.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Don McLean 的《Living Free (Live Manchester '75)》记录了他 1975 年的现场演出，包含多首经典歌曲，音质优良，值得收藏。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Don McLean's 'Living Free (Live Manchester '75)' captures his 1975 live performance, featuring many classic songs with excellent sound quality, a collector's item.

releasedThisWeek.title: Melodrama
releasedThisWeek.highlight: LINA 的流行情感大作，旋律抓耳。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: LINA's pop emotional masterpiece with catchy melodies.
releasedThisWeek.summary: LINA 的《Melodrama》是一张充满情感的流行专辑，旋律上口，歌词直击人心，适合流行乐迷。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: LINA's 'Melodrama' is an emotional pop album with catchy melodies and heartfelt lyrics, suitable for pop fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: The Power Station
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 经典摇滚乐队同名专辑，复古摇滚的回归。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Classic rock band's self-titled album, a return of retro rock.
releasedThisWeek.summary: The Power Station 的同名专辑《The Power Station》是一张充满力量的摇滚专辑，融合了放克和流行元素，节奏强劲，适合摇滚爱好者。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album is a powerful rock record blending funk and pop elements, with strong rhythms, perfect for rock enthusiasts.

releasedThisWeek.title: Galaxia Tropical
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 德国厂牌发行的热带拉丁音乐，异域风情。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Tropical Latin music released by a German label, exotic flavor.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical 的《Galaxia Tropical》是一张充满拉丁热带风情的专辑，节奏欢快，适合跳舞和放松。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's 'Galaxia Tropical' is a lively Latin tropical album with upbeat rhythms, great for dancing and relaxation.

releasedThisWeek.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Robin Trower 的美国现场，布鲁斯摇滚的盛宴。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Robin Trower's US live, a feast of blues rock.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Robin Trower 的《One Moment in Time: Live in the USA》记录了他在美国的现场演出，吉他演奏精湛，布鲁斯韵味十足。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Robin Trower's 'One Moment in Time: Live in the USA' captures his US live performances, featuring精湛 guitar work and rich blues flavor.

releasedThisWeek.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedThisWeek.highlight: Dave Matthews Band 2025 年现场实况，乐迷必备。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band's 2025 live recording, a must for fans.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dave Matthews Band 的《Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025》是他们在里士满的现场录音，乐队状态极佳，曲目经典，是乐迷的珍藏。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Dave Matthews Band's 'Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025' is a live recording from Richmond, with the band in top form and classic setlist, a treasure for fans.

releasedThisWeek.title: Pause for a moment
releasedThisWeek.highlight: 瑞士摇摆乐团的悠闲时刻，复古而优雅。
releasedThisWeek.highlightEn: A leisurely moment from a Swiss swing band, retro and elegant.
releasedThisWeek.summary: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing 的《Pause for a moment》是一张轻松的摇摆乐专辑，风格复古，适合放松心情。
releasedThisWeek.summaryEn: Dela Hüttner’s SwingThing's 'Pause for a moment' is a relaxed swing album with a retro style, perfect for unwinding.

upcoming.title: could never forget
upcoming.highlight: 不容错过的流行巨作，Lil Nas X的未完成梦境
upcoming.highlightEn: Unmissable pop masterpiece, Lil Nas X's unfinished dream
upcoming.summary: 尽管标题为未完成，但这张专辑展现了Lil Nas X标志性的风格融合与情感深度，是当代流行音乐的亮点。
upcoming.summaryEn: Despite the unfinished title, this album showcases Lil Nas X's signature genre-blending and emotional depth, a highlight of contemporary pop.

upcoming.title: Together Again
upcoming.highlight: 民谣传奇联手，温暖人心的合作专辑
upcoming.highlightEn: Folk legends unite, a heartwarming collaborative album
upcoming.summary: John McCutcheon与Tom Paxton两位民谣大师的合作，带来质朴而深刻的作品，适合喜欢传统民谣的听众。
upcoming.summaryEn: A collaboration between folk masters John McCutcheon and Tom Paxton, delivering simple yet profound songs for traditional folk lovers.

upcoming.title: Euphoria
upcoming.highlight: 电子氛围之旅，Schiller的梦幻新作
upcoming.highlightEn: Electronic ambient journey, Schiller's dreamy new release
upcoming.summary: Schiller的《Euphoria》延续其标志性的电子氛围风格，营造出沉浸式的听觉体验，适合放松与冥想。
upcoming.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' continues his signature electronic ambient style, creating an immersive auditory experience for relaxation and meditation.

upcoming.title: Utan Ok Innan
upcoming.highlight: 北欧暗黑金属，Vígundr的狂暴单曲
upcoming.highlightEn: Nordic black metal, Vígundr's ferocious single
upcoming.summary: 《Utan Ok Innan》是Vígundr的强力单曲，融合了黑金属的暴烈与旋律，适合极端金属乐迷。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Utan Ok Innan' is a powerful single by Vígundr, blending the ferocity of black metal with melody, a must for extreme metal fans.

upcoming.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
upcoming.highlight: 独立摇滚的奇思妙想，Brodie Milner的惊喜单曲
upcoming.highlightEn: Indie rock whimsy, Brodie Milner's surprising single
upcoming.summary: 《Convenience Store Gospel》以其独特的幽默感和独立摇滚风格，带来轻松有趣的聆听体验。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Convenience Store Gospel' offers a lighthearted and fun listening experience with its unique humor and indie rock style.

upcoming.title: Electric Fantasy
upcoming.highlight: 热带风情电子，Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical的舞曲盛宴
upcoming.highlightEn: Tropical electronic, Ranil Y Su Conjunto Tropical's dance party
upcoming.summary: 《Galaxia Tropical》融合了拉丁节奏与现代电子，充满活力，适合派对氛围。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Galaxia Tropical' blends Latin rhythms with modern electronic, full of energy and perfect for party vibes.

upcoming.title: Shion. E.P
upcoming.highlight: 前卫摇滚的太空漫游，X - Tram的迷幻专辑
upcoming.highlightEn: Progressive rock space odyssey, X - Tram's psychedelic album
upcoming.summary: 《Outroom》带领听众进入一场迷幻的前卫摇滚之旅，复杂编曲与太空主题相得益彰。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Outroom' takes listeners on a psychedelic progressive rock journey, with complex arrangements complementing the space theme.

upcoming.title: Plays World Hits
upcoming.highlight: 吉他大师现场，Robin Trower的蓝调摇滚盛宴
upcoming.highlightEn: Guitar master live, Robin Trower's blues rock feast
upcoming.summary: Robin Trower的现场专辑《One Moment in Time》捕捉了其精湛的吉他技艺和蓝调摇滚的即兴魅力。
upcoming.summaryEn: Robin Trower's live album 'One Moment in Time' captures his masterful guitar skills and the improvisational charm of blues rock.

upcoming.title: Eingenordet
upcoming.highlight: 德国民谣金属，Versengold的史诗新作
upcoming.highlightEn: German folk metal, Versengold's epic new release
upcoming.summary: 《Eingenordet》融合了民谣旋律与金属力量，讲述北欧传奇，是民谣金属爱好者的佳选。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Eingenordet' blends folk melodies with metal power, telling Nordic legends, a great choice for folk metal fans.

upcoming.title: Melodrama
upcoming.highlight: 流行新星LINA的戏剧情感专辑
upcoming.highlightEn: Pop newcomer LINA's dramatic emotional album
upcoming.summary: 《Melodrama》展现了LINA强烈的戏剧感和情感表达，适合喜欢流行音乐中叙事风格的听众。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'Melodrama' showcases LINA's strong sense of drama and emotional expression, suitable for listeners who enjoy narrative pop.

upcoming.title: The Power Station
upcoming.highlight: 经典摇滚复兴，The Power Station的同名专辑
upcoming.highlightEn: Classic rock revival, The Power Station's self-titled album
upcoming.summary: 《The Power Station》回归80年代摇滚风格，充满能量与旋律，适合怀旧摇滚乐迷。
upcoming.summaryEn: 'The Power Station' returns to 80s rock style, full of energy and melody, perfect for nostalgic rock fans.
